scripts.docker:up:api: docker compose up app-assurmoi-node app-assurmoi-mailhog app-assurmoi-db app-assurmoi-adminer
scripts.docker:up:api:build: docker compose up --build app-assurmoi-node app-assurmoi-mailhog app-assurmoi-db app-assurmoi-adminer
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:migrate
scripts.db:migrate:undo: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node sequelize db:migrate:undo
scripts.db:seed: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:seed:docker: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:seed:undo: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo
scripts.db:seed:undo:all: docker compose run app-assurmoi-node npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo:all
